stimulus: Each phase of the Apollo 17 lunar mission, which spanned twelve days and fourteen hours in December 1972, ______blank documented in meticulous logs by ground controllers.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice B is the best answer. The convention being tested is subject-verb agreement. The singular verb "was" agrees in number with the singular subject "each phase," even though the interrupting relative clause contains the plural noun "days."

Choice A is incorrect because the plural verb "are" doesn't agree in number with the singular subject "each phase." Choice C is incorrect because the plural verb "have been" doesn't agree in number with the singular subject "each phase." Choice D is incorrect because the plural verb "were" doesn't agree in number with the singular subject "each phase."
